scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.test:parallel: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c bgBlue,bgMagenta "npm run test:server" "npm run test:client"
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "cd server && npm test -- --watch" "cd client && npm test"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
